scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const arch=process.arch;const libc=process.env.LIBC||'gnu';const pkg='swc-linux-'+arch+'-'+libc;const fname='next-'+pkg+'.node';const src=p.resolve('node_modules/@next/'+pkg,fname);const dst=p.resolve('node_modules/next/next-swc-fallback/@next/'+pkg,fname);if(fs.existsSync(src)&&!fs.existsSync(dst)){fs.mkdirSync(p.dirname(dst),{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('[postinstall] SWC binary copied: '+pkg)}"
